Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, translating learnings into clear engineering direction.

Defined and tracked outcome-based KPIs—time-to-launch, end-to-end quality scores, and operational visibility—by sitting in on operator sessions to systematically surface pain points and feed roadmap investments.
